title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aparna Constructions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aparna Constructions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!
